title: Scrap Wars| Demolition Derby Survival
description: Vehicle combat survival game developed in Unity featuring AI opponents, a dynamic vehicle damage system, and deep gameplay systems.

breakdown.label: AI Systems
breakdown.summary: State-machine-driven enemy AI with dynamic difficulty scaling.
breakdown.details: Built a finite state machine for opponent AI covering idle, chase, attack, and evade states. Implemented difficulty scaling that adjusts opponent aggression and reaction time based on player survival time. Used Unity's NavMesh for pathfinding within the arena.

breakdown.label: Vehicle Damage System
breakdown.summary: Procedural mesh deformation tied to physics collision force.
breakdown.details: Designed a modular damage system where each vehicle section has its own health pool. Collisions above a force threshold trigger mesh deformation using vertex displacement. Visual damage states (dents, sparks, smoke particles) layer progressively as health decreases.

breakdown.label: Physics & Handling
breakdown.summary: Custom WheelCollider tuning for arcade-feel vehicle physics.
breakdown.details: Extended Unity's WheelCollider system with custom friction curves to achieve a fun, arcade-style handling model. Added drift mechanics via lateral force blending and implemented a rigidbody centre-of-mass adjustment for consistent flip resistance.

breakdown.label: Performance Optimization
breakdown.summary: Maintained 60fps on mid-range hardware through targeted profiling.
breakdown.details: Used Unity Profiler to identify draw call bottlenecks. Implemented static batching for arena geometry, GPU instancing for particle debris, and LOD groups on vehicle meshes. Final build holds 60fps on mid-range mobile GPUs.

title: Airborne Bling | 3D Flight Adventure
description: Browser-based 3D flight game built with React Three Fiber featuring aircraft controls, collectible targets, collision detection, dynamic environments, and immersive gameplay systems.

breakdown.label: Flight System
breakdown.summary: Custom aircraft movement and camera-follow mechanics.
breakdown.details: Developed a custom flight controller using local axis transformations for pitch, roll, yaw, and forward movement. Implemented smooth quaternion interpolation for realistic aircraft rotation and a dynamic third-person chase camera that follows the aircraft with cinematic movement.

breakdown.label: Gameplay Systems
breakdown.summary: Collectible targets, scoring, and progression mechanics.
breakdown.details: Designed collectible coin targets distributed throughout the environment. Implemented collision detection between the aircraft and collectibles, score tracking, target respawning, and reward-based progression systems to encourage exploration and skillful flying.

breakdown.label: Collision & Boundaries
breakdown.summary: Terrain collision detection and restricted-area management.
breakdown.details: Built a raycast-based terrain collision system that continuously checks aircraft altitude relative to the environment. Added boundary detection, warning states, crash handling, and game-over conditions to create structured gameplay constraints.

breakdown.label: Environment & Rendering
breakdown.details: Integrated GLTF environment assets, HDR lighting, reflective water surfaces, skybox rendering, post-processing effects, and optimized scene management. Used React Three Fiber and Three.js to maintain smooth performance while rendering a large explorable landscape.

breakdown.label: Game UI & Menus
breakdown.details: Developed a complete game interface including start menu, pause menu, warning notifications, game-over screens, score display, and upgrade interactions. Implemented event-driven communication between gameplay systems and UI components for responsive user feedback.

title: Hell Drive
description: Level-based driving game built in Unity. Drive through obstacle-filled environments, collect coins, and minimize vehicle damage to complete each level.

breakdown.label: Level Design
breakdown.summary: Iterative blockout-to-final pipeline with focus on flow and pacing.
breakdown.details: Started each level with a grey-box blockout to validate driving flow and checkpoint spacing. Used playtesting data to iteratively widen corners, adjust ramp angles, and redistribute collectibles.

breakdown.label: Collectible System
breakdown.summary: Data-driven collectible spawner with persistent save state.
breakdown.details: Built a ScriptableObject-based collectible system allowing designers to define item types, spawn weights, and point values without touching code. Collected state is persisted via PlayerPrefs with a serialised bitfield for efficient storage.

breakdown.label: Progression Design
breakdown.summary: Unlockable levels and vehicles gated by score thresholds.
breakdown.details: Designed a meta-progression loop where star ratings (1–3 per level) unlock new vehicles and level packs. Score thresholds were tuned against playtest completion data to maintain a challenging but fair difficulty curve.

breakdown.label: UI & Feedback
breakdown.summary: Responsive Unity UI Toolkit HUD with animated score feedback.
breakdown.details: Built the in-game HUD using Unity UI Toolkit for resolution independence. Implemented animated score popups using DOTween with eased scale and fade. Speedometer needle rotates via a shader-driven UV offset for zero runtime overhead.
